pi_items.source: Task description (task.json lines 5-6) and verified against ActivInspire shape tools documentation
Task description requires one rectangle and one circle/ellipse (2 shapes total)
Task description and setup_task.sh (line 8) which creates this directory
Combination of directory and filename verified against task.json description

privileged_info_summary: The draw_basic_shapes task requires creating a flipchart with exactly two shapes: a rectangle and a circle/ellipse. The flipchart must be saved as 'shapes_lesson.flipchart' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. ActivInspire flipchart files in this environment are ZIP archives containing XML definitions of drawn shapes. Both required shapes must be present in the file for task completion.
